violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -No CFSM at this location

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -All sani buckets found with 0ppm Quat. *COS-Dispenser chemical was out, restocked and buckets were remade. -Sani cloth left on table top between uses at shake station.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Back room 2 door freezer has a split gasket on the right door and some cracking at the gasket of the single door refrigerator.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Hand sink at coffee station had pitcher in basin, appeared to be used as a dump sink and access was impeded by several items.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Paper towel dispenser at dish pit does not work. *Loose roll of paper towels is kept on table top next to sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — ---Heavy build up of frost/ice at top shelves and floor of walk in freezer. (Items on top shelves will be wasted.)--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Residue build up at floor drains.
Food service manager certification. — --Person in charge did not hold an approved food service manager certificate.
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
